title: dryopteris decussata
intro: Dryopteris decussata, also known as the scaly male fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus and is native to Europe. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The scaly male fern can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
